# Top-level runtime dependencies.
#
# Pins use ``~=`` (compatible release): the patch/minor versions are
# allowed to float for security fixes but a major upgrade requires an
# explicit PR. This catches a Django 6.0 surprise that ``>=`` would
# silently accept while still letting Dependabot ship 5.2.3 -> 5.2.4.
#
# A future tightening pass should switch to a hashes-pinned lockfile
# generated by ``pip-compile --generate-hashes`` (tracked as ASVS
# 14.2.3 in docs/COMPLIANCE_ASVS_L2_2026-06-15.md).
alembic~=1.13
Django~=5.2
Pillow~=11.0
psycopg[binary]~=3.1
pyotp~=2.9
python-dateutil~=2.9
PyYAML~=6.0
qrcode~=7.4
SQLAlchemy~=2.0
uvicorn[standard]~=0.30
